title: verbascum × interjectum
intro: Verbascum × interjectum, also known as Mullein, is a hybrid plant species in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) that is native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Mullein has several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and promoting relaxation. Mullein can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
